summary: Iteration 107: Mixer Presets System - All backend APIs and frontend UI tested successfully. 19/19 backend tests passed, all frontend interactions verified.
seed_data_creation: 8 featured presets auto-seeded on first GET /api/mixer-presets/featured call
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mixer Presets system fully implemented. 8 staff pick presets seeded (Morning Awakening, Deep Meditation, Creative Flow, Sleep Journey, Heart Opening, Third Eye Activation, Forest Retreat, Cosmic Dance). All CRUD operations working. Frontend has Presets button, tabs (Staff Picks/Community/My Presets), save form with name/description/public toggle, load/like/delete functionality.

backend_apis.GET /api/mixer-presets/featured: PASS - Returns 8 staff pick presets with all required fields
backend_apis.GET /api/mixer-presets/community: PASS - Returns public presets sorted by like_count descending
backend_apis.GET /api/mixer-presets/mine: PASS - Returns user's personal presets, requires auth
backend_apis.POST /api/mixer-presets: PASS - Creates new preset with layers, volumes, tags, is_public
backend_apis.POST /api/mixer-presets/:id/like: PASS - Toggles like status, returns liked boolean and like_count
backend_apis.DELETE /api/mixer-presets/:id: PASS - Deletes user's own preset, returns 404 for others' presets

frontend_ui.presets_button: PASS - data-testid='presets-browse-btn' visible in Production Console
frontend_ui.preset_cards: PASS - Show name, description, layer tags, Load button, heart count
frontend_ui.save_mix_button: PASS - data-testid='presets-save-btn' appears when layers active
frontend_ui.save_form: PASS - Has name input, description input, public/private toggle, save button
frontend_ui.load_preset: PASS - Clicking Load activates correct layers
frontend_ui.like_preset: PASS - Clicking heart toggles like and updates count
frontend_ui.delete_preset: PASS - Delete button visible on My Presets cards, removes preset
